name: Souffle Au Grand Marnier
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip the heavy cream with sugar until soft peaks form. Set aside.
2. Beat the egg yolks with the remaining sugar and water in a saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly until thick and lemon-yellow in color.
3. Remove from heat and continue beating to cool. Stir in the Grand Marnier.
4. Gradually fold this mixture into the whipped cream.
5. Whisk the egg whites until stiff peaks form. Gently fold them into the souffle batter.
6. Transfer the batter to a buttered dish with a paper collar. Chill thoroughly.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) until risen and golden brown, about 30-35 minutes.
8. Remove the paper collar before serving and dust with cocoa powder.
Source: Great Chefs of New Orleans, Tele-record Productions - 1983
From: www.greatchefs.com
747 Magazine Street, New Orleans, LA 70130
Chef Chris Kerageorgiou, La Provence Restaurant, New Orleans
